title: Mantiz Ground Truth Entry
description: A labeled PR diff used as ground truth for calibrating Mantiz detection system

id.description: Unique ground truth identifier, e.g. gt_0001

source.description: Where this ground truth sample came from

repo.description: GitHub repository in owner/repo format, e.g. vitest-dev/vitest

detected_by.description: Which detectors flagged patterns in this PR

label.description: Ground truth label assigned by human reviewer

label_evidence.description: Detailed explanation of why this label was assigned — include reviewer quotes, diff analysis, or historical context

labeler.description: Name or handle of the person who labeled this entry

labeled_at.description: Date when the label was assigned, ISO 8601 format YYYY-MM-DD

labeling_session.description: Session number for tracking labeling consistency over time

detector_version_commit.description: Git commit hash of the detector version used when scanning this PR

diff_snippet.description: Relevant portion of the diff (optional — can reference file path instead)

notes.description: Free-form notes about this entry — context, uncertainties, cross-references

review_time_seconds.description: How long the reviewer spent labeling this entry (for fatigue tracking)

then.description: AMBIGUOUS entries must include a reason in notes

allOf.description: Sensitive info must be redacted from label_evidence
allOf.$comment: Validation: ensure no emails, personal names, or internal URLs in label_evidence
